mcq.question: What is an embedded system?
mcq.correct: A computer built into another device to perform a specific function
wrong: A large computer used in an office
A type of external hard drive
A computer used only for gaming

mcq.question: What is the main purpose of an embedded system?
mcq.correct: To carry out a dedicated task
wrong: To run many different office programs

mcq.question: Which of these is an example of an embedded system?
How is an embedded system different from a general-purpose computer?
mcq.correct: It is designed for a specific task
wrong: It can only be used at school

mcq.question: Why are embedded systems often efficient?
mcq.correct: They are designed to do one job well
wrong: They are connected to more printers
